title: Sheep Tails
excerpt: Ingredients 30 sheep tails 3 whole cloves salt, pepper and coriander to taste 250 ml tomato sauce 100 ml chutney 100 ml Worcester sauce 250 ml white wine 1 onion in rings 60 ml sugar salt and pepper Method Slice the onion and pack it in the bottom of an ovenproof dish. html:
Ingredients

  • 30 sheep tails
  • 3 whole cloves
  • salt, pepper and coriander to taste
  • 250 ml tomato sauce
  • 100 ml chutney
  • 100 ml Worcester sauce
  • 250 ml white wine
  • 1 onion in rings
  • 60 ml sugar
  • salt and pepper

Method

Slice the onion and pack it in the bottom of an ovenproof dish.

Place the tails on top and season with salt and pepper.

Mix the rest of the ingredients and pour over the tails.

Bake covered at 180 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes.

Then uncover and roast for 60 minutes or until done. Turn continually.

Easy!
